page.title: Reservations
page.subtitle: Seat your guests, mark no-shows, or cancel reservations. Guests are emailed when you cancel.
page.noRestaurant: No restaurant linked to this account.

empty.pastHint: Completed and cancelled reservations appear here after their date.
empty.defaultHint: Guests who book through your public page will appear here straight away.

toast.updateFailed: The reservation could not be updated.

cancel.title: Cancel reservation
cancel.reasonsHint: The guest will see a friendly version of this reason in the email they receive.
cancel.toastCancelledNoEmail: Cancelled — the email to the guest could not be sent.
cancel.cancelFailed: The reservation could not be cancelled.

errors.noPermissionAction: You do not have permission for this action.
errors.noPermissionCancel: You do not have permission to cancel reservations.
errors.onlyConfirmed: Only confirmed reservations can be cancelled.
